channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Microsoft's massive Kenya AI data center would require switching off 'half the country' to meet power requirements, government says — $1 billion project stalls over capacity disagreements and lack of infrastructure
item.description: The project was supposed to bring a geothermal-powered data center to the Olkaria region in Kenya's Rift Valley. [Microsoft]

item.title: Samsung, SK Hynix earn more profit than all of listed India Inc
item.description: South Korean chipmakers Samsung and SK Hynix collectively posted record profits of $59.7 billion in the March 2026 quarter, surpassing India Inc's aggregate profit for any previous quarter. This surge is driven by booming AI capital expenditure, with memory c… [Samsung]

item.title: ​Chip Rally: Wall Street bets big on AMD’s AI growth story
item.description: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) hit a new 52-week high as investor enthusiasm around artificial intelligence continued to lift semiconductor stocks. Analysts expect AMD to benefit from rising AI infrastructure spending, strong server chip demand, and expanding e… [Intel, AMD]

item.title: Cisco Earnings Watch: Can AI momentum drive another rally?
item.description: Cisco Systems will announce its Q3 FY26 earnings on May 13, 2026. Investors are looking for updates on AI infrastructure demand, enterprise spending and cloud investments. The stock has rallied strongly in 2026, supported by optimism around AI networking oppo… [Cisco]

item.title: NVIDIA Stock Hits Record $219.44 as AI Demand Powers Gains Ahead of May 20 Earnings
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. — NVIDIA Corp. shares surged to a new all-time closing high of $219.44 on Monday, gaining $4.22 or 1.96%, as investor optimism built around the artificial intelligence chip leader's explosive growth in data center demand and upcoming fisca… [Intel, Nvidia]

item.description: A Singapore AI startup became Meta’s $2 billion target, but China says the deal cannot move forward under its rules Vozpopuli [Meta]

item.title: IT stocks crack over AI-native firms’ entry into software services
item.description: The market reaction underlines the growing fear that AI giants such as OpenAI and Anthropic are beginning to encroach on the core business of India’s $250 billion IT outsourcing industry. [OpenAI, Anthropic]

item.title: AI security startup Grego AI debuts, claims record $250,000 bounty for AI-found exploit
item.description: Artificial intelligence cybersecurity startup Grego AI formally launched today with a claimed method of using existing AI models to find critical software vulnerabilities that human auditors and other automated tools routinely miss. Founded in 2024, the compa… [Intel]

item.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang says AI will transform these traditionally low-paying jobs in the US into six-figure careers, rings alarm bells for techies
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang predicts a massive job boom for electricians, plumbers, and builders, driven by the AI revolution. He stated that the unprecedented infrastructure buildout for AI data centers will transform traditional trades into high-paying, six-fig… [Nvidia]

item.title: IREN plans $2B convertible notes for data center expansion and AI infrastructure
item.description: IREN's strategic pivot to AI infrastructure, backed by renewable energy, could redefine data center sustainability and market competitiveness. The post IREN plans $2B convertible notes for data center expansion and AI infrastructure appeared first on Crypto B…

item.title: India's IT shares near three‑year low as OpenAI move revives AI fears
item.description: May 12 : India's IT shares fell to a three-year low on Tuesday as investor jitters around the threat posed by artificial intelligence to flagship IT firms flared up again, after OpenAI announced a new AI venture.The Nifty IT index fell 3.6 per cent to its low… [Intel, OpenAI]

item.title: NeptuneZero: 500,000 euro investment
item.description: NeptuneZero, a Greek deep-tech startup developing artificial intelligence solutions for optimizing vessel performance and automating maritime reporting, has announced a 500,000 euro investment. Corallia Ventures TT AKES led the funding… NeptuneZero: 500,000 e… [Intel]

item.title: Tesla Stock Surges 3.89% to $445 as China Sales Jump and Optimus Bets Fuel AI Optimism
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas — Tesla Inc. shares climbed sharply Monday, closing at $445.00, up $16.65 or 3.89%, as investors bet on the electric vehicle maker's accelerating shift toward artificial intelligence, robotics and autonomy despite ongoing challenges in tradition… [Intel, Tesla]

item.title: Intel Stock Surges 3.62% to $129.44 on Apple Deal Hopes and AI Momentum
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. — Intel Corp. shares climbed sharply Monday, closing at $129.44, up $4.52 or 3.62%, as investor optimism swelled over a potential landmark manufacturing deal with Apple and continued strength in artificial intelligence-driven demand for it… [Intel, Apple]

item.title: US Stock Market: AI spending surge drives Alphabet, Amazon to tap global bond markets
item.description: Alphabet and Amazon are expanding their global borrowing to fund the escalating costs of the AI race. Alphabet plans its first yen-denominated bond sale, while Amazon will tap the Swiss franc market for the first time. These moves reflect the massive investme… [Amazon, Alphabet]
